allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix instructor availability calendar to show scheduled classes

- Add useInstructorClasses and useInstructorAvailability hooks to AvailabilityView
- Pass scheduledClasses prop from InstructorPortal to AvailabilityView
- Scheduled classes now display as blue circles on the calendar
- Available dates display as green circles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix instructor availability calendar to show scheduled classes

- Add useInstructorClasses and useInstructorAvailability hooks to AvailabilityView
- Pass scheduledClasses prop from InstructorPortal to AvailabilityView
- Scheduled classes now display as blue circles on the calendar
- Available dates display as green circles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/gerog/Documents/cpr-jun21-dev" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix organization invoices - remove obsolete invoice_id mapping

Backend now returns ''id'' directly, so the mapping that tried to
convert invoice_id to id was causing undefined values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 curl -sk -k --max-time 30 -u "kaizenmo:!Register001" \\
  "https://69.72.136.201:2083/execute/Fileman/get_file_content?dir=%2Fhome%2Fkaizenmo%2Fcpr.kpbc.ca&file=stderr.log" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
content = d.get\('data',{}\).get\('content',''\)
if content:
    # Show last part related to email
    lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
    email_lines = [l for l in lines if 'EMAIL' in l or 'SMTP' in l or 'email' in l.lower\(\) or 'forgot' in l.lower\(\) or 'reset' in l.lower\(\)]
    print\('=== EMAIL/SMTP lines ==='\)
    for l in email_lines[-30:]:
        print\(l\)
    print\('=== Last 20 lines ==='\)
    for l in lines[-20:]:
        print\(l\)
else:
    print\('No content or file not found:', d.get\('errors'\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)
